name: Torasemide
executiveSummary: Loop diuretic with a longer half-life, for CHF and hypertension.
indications:
## Indications

- Chronic heart failure, peripheral edema.
- Arterial hypertension (PO).

## Precautions

- Hypokalemia, hypovolemia.
- Monitor renal function.

> Adjust according to institutional protocols and medical prescription.

adulto.dose: 10–20 mg IV/PO every 24 h; titrate according to diuresis.

neonatal.dose: Restricted use according to NICU cardiorenal protocol.

stability:
## Stability

- IV according to package insert.
adverseEffects:
## Adverse effects

- Hypokalemia, dizziness, elevated uric acid.

bibliography.citation: American Heart Association. ACLS / PALS / NRP Guidelines.
ANMAT. Drug information and authorized prescribing information in Argentina.
Society of Critical Care Medicine (SCCM). ICU medication guidelines.
American Academy of Pediatrics. Medication guidance in critical care.
